name: html-artifacts
description: Create polished static HTML artifacts and serve them over the local Tailscale network.

interface.shortDescription: Author and share static HTML reports.
interface.longDescription: Adds Elephant Hand's HTML artifact designer and static HTML sharing skills for benchmark reports, comparison pages, plans, option galleries, workbenches, and short-lived local HTML artifacts served on localhost and Tailscale.
defaultPrompt: Create a readable HTML benchmark report and serve it to me.
Turn this plan into a polished static HTML artifact.
Make an HTML option gallery for these UI directions.
